_meta.description: CGO MESSAGE 영상통화 실시간 번역 자막 seed - 배열 구조 [{id,ko,en}] (역조회 0ms 최적화)

_meta.lookup_note: id 인덱싱 + ko/타깃 양방향 해시 구축용

entries.en: So glad to see your face
What have you been up to?

Let me know when you arrive

In front of the convenience store

entries.en: Can I change the number of people?
Could you give up your seat?
Can I put it up top?
I'll pick it up in the evening
A room with a good view please
Do you have a single room?

entries.ko: 큰 침대 하나예요, 침대 두 개예요?
entries.en: One big bed or two beds?
How to set the safe code?

I want to have laundry done

entries.ko: 일출 볼 수 있는 곳이 어디예요?

entries.en: Can I leave key at front desk?
I don't know what this is
There are bugs in the room

entries.ko: 청소가 잘 안 된 것 같아요

I'm coming down with a cold
I think I broke a bone
I got bitten by a bug
I was bitten by a snake
I was bitten by a dog

I need to go to the ER
I want to see internal medicine
I want to see a dentist
Can I use a blood pressure monitor?

Not sure if I have allergies

영어 할 줄 아는 사람 있어요?

Watch the kid for a moment
Takes two and a half hours

I'll invite you to the chat

entries.en: Can I get info via app?
I want to take a cruise

entries.ko: 기저귀 갈 수 있는 곳 있어요?

Now that I think of it

In front of the convenience store

Thank you for caring even about this
May good things fill your life
What did you have for dinner?
You first, if you don't mind

entries.ko: 그럴 수도 있고 아닐 수도 있어요

entries.en: How will you spend the holiday?
Have to go to work dinner
Can you talk for a moment?
Let me know when you arrive
Contact me when you get here
I'll call back, you're breaking up
Could you say that one more time?
Can we talk for a bit?
I'm a bit busy right now
I have to go, something urgent
I have to go to a meeting
I'll hang up and call back
I have to take an urgent call
I'll check and let you know
Tilt the camera up a bit.
The picture's breaking up, I can't see well.
Where are you? That background's unusual.
Are you lying down right now?

entries.ko: 화면 고정 좀 해봐, 멀미 나.
entries.en: Hold the screen still, I'm getting dizzy.
Turn up the volume, I can't hear.
Oh, I can see you well now.
Let me flip the camera for a sec.

entries.ko: 거기 비 와? 창문 좀 보여줘.
entries.en: Is it raining there? Show me the window.
Why are you dressed like that?
You home? I can see a pillow behind you.

entries.ko: 너 링크 보낸 거 화면에 띄워봐.
entries.en: Pull up that link you sent on screen.
Ugh, got dropped because of lag.
Do I look okay right now?
Hold on, I'm getting a call.
My battery's low, I might cut off.
Is my voice cutting out on your end too?
You covered the camera with your hand.
Whoa, you scared me! Don't get so close.
What's with your voice, do you have a cold?
There's way too much background noise.
I'll just mute myself for a bit.
That angle's something else, who even is this?
What time is it on the clock behind you?
Eating something good? Gimme a bite.

entries.ko: 세로가 나은 것 같아, 다시 돌려.

entries.en: What's with the virtual background, hilarious.
It cut out then came back, say it again.
I only see your nostrils, lower the angle.
Hold on, someone rang the bell.
Don't look at the screen, watch where you're going.
Why do you look so scruffy?
You've got sleep in your eye, wipe it.
Ah, got dropped. Switching to data.
Why do you sound so hyped?

entries.ko: 나 지금 안색 안 좋으니까 필터 킨다.
entries.en: I look rough, turning on a filter.
You just covered the mic with your hand.
Turn on a light, it's creepy.
Did you lose weight in your face?
Is that a doll in the background?
Say something, can you hear me?
Oh, you're moving! You were frozen before.

entries.ko: 고개 좀 뒤로 가봐, 너무 부담스러워.
entries.en: Lean back a bit, you're too close.
I thought there was dust on my screen.
Ugh, you made me yawn too.
You're distracted, aren't you? Your eyes are wandering.
Should we turn off video and just talk?
My face is puffy, isn't it?
Your family's walking by behind you, is that okay?
One of your earphones fell out.
Don't yell, my ears are bursting.
You need to clean your room.

entries.ko: 아, 렉 걸려서 말을 못 하겠네.
entries.en: Ugh, the lag's making it impossible to talk.

entries.ko: 너 지금 밖이야? 바람 소리 장난 아니다.
entries.en: Are you outside? The wind's insane.
Almost dropped my phone, that scared me.
I can only see your right eye.
It's nice talking face to face.
You're in the bathroom, right? It echoes.
Move your finger, it's blocking the view.
Don't look at the screen, look at the lens.
You'll hurt your neck, raise the phone.
Are you even listening to me?

entries.ko: 너 뒤에 책꽂이 책 엄청 많다.
entries.en: You've got so many books on that shelf.

entries.ko: 화면 필터 너무 과한 거 아냐?
entries.en: Isn't that filter a bit much?

entries.ko: 눈이 세 배는 커진 거 같아.
entries.en: Your eyes look three times bigger.

entries.ko: 나 화장 안 해서 화면 가릴래.
entries.en: I've got no makeup on, I'll hide my screen.
Is that a pile of clothes behind you?
The quality's like an ancient flip phone.
Let me mute and take this call.
Oh, we talked over each other. You go first.
What was I about to say?
Did you turn on a lamp?
Is the text at the bottom covered?

entries.ko: 너 지금 가만히 좀 있어 봐.

entries.en: It's because my charging cable is short.

entries.ko: 화면 공유 좀 해줄 수 있어?
너 어디 기댄 거야? 화면 흔들려.
entries.en: What are you leaning on? The screen's shaking.

entries.ko: 밖이라 잘 안 들려, 크게 말해줘.
entries.en: I'm outside, can't hear well, speak up.
Your earphone mic is cutting out.

entries.ko: 화면 반사돼서 니 얼굴 두 개 보여.
entries.en: There's a reflection, I see two of your face.

entries.ko: 폰 기종 바꿨어? 화질 장난 아니다.

entries.en: Why so still, are you sleepy?

entries.ko: 너 지금 화면 캡처했지? 불빛 반짝했어.
entries.en: You just took a screenshot, right? It flashed.
Ugh, my phone's starting to overheat.
Wi-Fi must be bad, let's move on.
Tap the button at the bottom.
Even if my video cuts, can you still hear me?

entries.ko: 너 방금 동영상 정지 화면인 줄.
entries.en: I thought you were a frozen frame just now.
The door behind you is open, go close it.
Why is only half your face showing?
Hold the phone at eye level.
If it drops, I'll call you back.
Did you see me yawn just now?
That's a coat rack behind you, right?
You found your best angle, huh.
Are you lying on your stomach?
Your voice is screechy, take out the earphones.
Turn your brightness all the way up.

entries.ko: 너 표정 썩었다, 무슨 일 있냐?

entries.en: The camera's refusing to focus on you.
Did you have airplane mode on?
Is that an earring in your right ear?

entries.ko: 나 지금 배달 와서 잠깐만 멈춤!
entries.en: My delivery's here, pause for a sec!
The audio's about three seconds out of sync.
Close the window behind you, it's noisy.
So good to see your face, really.
Can you see me clearly on your screen?

entries.ko: 화면 끊기니까 무전기 하는 거 같다.
entries.en: With the lag it's like using walkie-talkies.
Move your light, you're in shadow.

entries.ko: 폰 들고 있는 손 안 아프냐?
entries.en: Doesn't your hand hurt holding the phone?

entries.ko: 너 배경화면 블러 처리 왜 풀렸어?
entries.en: Why did your background blur turn off?
The audio's crystal clear, it passes.

entries.ko: 너 눈 깜빡이는 것도 끊겨 보여.

entries.en: Got nowhere to prop your phone?
No makeup, so I'll just show my eyes.

entries.ko: 너 입 모양이랑 소리랑 따로 놀아.
entries.en: Your lips and the audio don't match.

entries.ko: 화면 멈춘 거 아니지? 눈 좀 깜빡여봐.
entries.en: It's not frozen, right? Blink for me.
You just rubbed the lens with your finger, didn't you?
What's that poster? Are you a fan of something?
Your voice echoes so much it's like an echo chamber.

entries.ko: 너 화면 필터 쓰니까 딴 사람 같다.
entries.en: That filter makes you look like a different person.

entries.ko: 폰 너무 가까워, 모공 다 보이겠다.
entries.en: Phone's too close, I can see your pores.

entries.ko: 나 잠깐 물 좀 떠 올게, 화면 그대로 둬.
entries.en: Let me grab some water, leave the screen on.
Tap the top right of the screen.

entries.ko: 너 지금 내 목소리 하울링 심해?
entries.en: Is my voice feeding back badly on your end?

entries.ko: 너 지금 이불 속이지? 답답해 보인다.
entries.en: You're under the covers, right? Looks stuffy.

entries.ko: 화면이 왜 이렇게 끊기냐, 와이파이 꺼라.
entries.en: Why's it so laggy, turn off the Wi-Fi.

entries.ko: 니 얼굴 보니까 살 것 같다.
entries.en: Seeing your face makes me feel alive.

entries.ko: 너 뒤에 불 켜진 거 스탠드야?
entries.en: Is that a lamp lit behind you?
Switch between the front and back camera.

entries.ko: 너 마이크 구멍에 먼지 꼈나 봐.
entries.en: Your mic hole must be clogged with dust.

entries.ko: 화면에 먼지 앉은 줄 알고 닦았잖아.
entries.en: I thought there was dust on my screen and wiped it.

entries.ko: 너 고개 돌릴 때 렉 걸려.
entries.en: It lags when you turn your head.
If you're not on unlimited data, let's hang up.

entries.ko: 너 얼굴 왤케 하얗게 나와, 달걀 귀신인 줄.
entries.en: Why's your face so washed out, you look like a ghost.

entries.ko: 나 지금 화면 상태 어때? 깨끗해?
너 왼쪽 눈썹 위에 그거 뭐야?
entries.en: What's that above your left eyebrow?

entries.ko: 목소리가 가래 끓는 소리 나, 마이크 닦아.
entries.en: Your voice sounds raspy, clean your mic.
Set it on a stand and relax.

entries.ko: 너 지금 화면에 나 작게 나오지?
entries.en: I show up small on your screen, right?

entries.ko: 뒤에 문 좀 닫아줘, 신경 쓰여.
entries.en: Close the door behind you, it's distracting.

entries.ko: 화면 프레임 뚝뚝 떨어지는 거 봐라.
entries.en: Look at the frame rate dropping.

entries.ko: 너 지금 딴 모니터 보고 있지? 눈빛 다 알아.
entries.en: You're looking at another monitor, right? I can tell by your eyes.
I thought your screen was off, it's so dark.
Ah, I can see the signs it's about to drop.

entries.ko: 너 귀에 무선 이어폰 한쪽 왜 안 껴?
entries.en: Why aren't you wearing one of your earbuds?
You look way better with the filter off.

entries.ko: 너 지금 손으로 하단 스피커 막음.
entries.en: You're covering the bottom speaker with your hand.
The audio delay's throwing off our whole conversation.

entries.ko: 일단 화면 끄고 음성으로만 다시 걸게!
entries.en: Let me turn off video and call back voice-only!
Um, how do I put this
You know what I mean, right?
and in the middle of all that
I suspected it, and sure enough
It's kind of, how to say
No, that's not what I mean
At the drop of a hat
It's awkward to say this myself, but
Don't take this the wrong way
Just when you let your guard down
In the blink of an eye
you know that rumor going around
It's all how you look at it
That's just how this world works

entries.ko: 한 귀로 듣고 한 귀로 흘려
entries.en: In one ear and out the other
Might as well rest while we're down
Now that I think about it
Because you've got something to hide
No use crying over spilt milk
Ah, my brain lagged, hold on
If you're going to do it half-heartedly
I thought they were all gone
that's what makes it worth it
Don't hit me with the hard truth
You poked at it and made it worse
The type to make life hard for themselves
You scared the life out of me
If I may add one more thing
I have a lot to say, but I won't
Ease up on the hard truths
A master of push and pull
You made a moment you'll regret
Now that you say it, fair point
In denial about being a fan?
I'm getting dizzy from the wait
fragile, breaks at the slightest thing
Exhausting just to hear about it
I'm at a loss for words
I can already tell how it ends
I need a change of pace
It twists my insides with envy
Acting like the center of the universe
I burned out everything I had
Please don't hit me with the truth
You hit the nail on the head
I can't recover from that truth bomb
I threw in everything I had
please learn to read the room
A sniper straight to my heart
Even baseless confidence is a skill
So satisfying, like a weight lifted
More charming the more you see
A dagger flew right at me
A fatal blow to my heart
It sparks my urge to explore
Don't want to lift a finger
I'll settle it in one line
You know without me saying, right?
Look at the core logic only
You're barking up the wrong tree
Sorry for the hard truth, but
I won't fall for word games
Don't even think of gaming it
The condition to close the deal
I'll settle it in one move.
You'll regret not settling this now
Cut the noise, stick to the point
The integrity of the core logic
Skip the preamble, just the point
See the cost savings for yourself
Not your opinion, the fact logs
Sorry, but it's the cold truth
Defend the upper hand at all costs
The might of the patent portfolio
Request to change terms is denied
The originality of the business model
A killer that flips the whole game
hesitate and you'll miss the boat
a clean sweep, proven by the data
Focus only on the core specs
Verifying the integrity of the metrics
The absolute bottom line for the deal
Defending quality as the top priority
Aiming for an independent hub network

entries.ko: 니 주관 말고 로그 파일 가져와
entries.en: Not your take, bring the log files
Sorry for the truth, but it's reality
The strength of the fundamental-physics design
Conquering the market with the score
A contract structure word games can't shake
The destructive power of the patent portfolio
In short, I'll settle this once and for all.
